mapper.sql: id, title, content, notice_type, priority, publisher_id, publisher_name, publish_time, expire_time, status, read_count, view_count, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, notice_type, priority, publisher_id, publisher_name, publish_time, expire_time, status, read_count, view_count, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{noticeType}, #{priority}, #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{publishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{status}, #{readCount}, #{viewCount}, #{isDeleted}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, priority = #{priority}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE notice SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.notice_type as noticeType, n.priority, n.publisher_id as publisherId, n.publisher_name as publisherName, n.publish_time as publishTime, n.expire_time as expireTime, n.view_count as viewCount, n.read_count as readCount, COALESCE(nr.read_status, 0) as readStatus, nr.read_at as readAt, n.created_at as createdAt FROM notice n LEFT JOIN notice_read nr ON n.id = nr.notice_id AND nr.user_id = #{userId} WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notice SET read_count = read_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM notice WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time <= NOW() AND is_deleted = 0
